text: The dim lights, angled lines, and empty room bring a sense of strangeness and intrigue. The glow of technology beyond the glass hints at human creativity and collaboration, yet the silence around me feels heavy. The wall ahead—inspiring thoughts of research and development—reminds me of potential and progress in places that appear still. I feel contemplative, slightly disoriented by the slanted views, but also stirred by the quiet energy of innovation that lingers in these walls.
